details.test: Task 1: Book earliest early-evening SMP consultation at Downtown Clinic
Task 2: Choose most affordable SMP package for hairline + crown under $2,500
Task 3: Add 3-item SMP aftercare kit under $60 each to cart
Task 4: Select cheaper treatment between FUE and SMP under $4,500 and start consultation
Task 5: Save 3 SMP gallery cases for men 30–39 with Norwood 3–4
Task 6: Choose financing plan with monthly payments under $300 for $3,200 procedure
Task 7: Send detailed SMP scar camouflage inquiry via contact form
Task 8: Register for evening SMP aftercare webinar on or after May 15, 2026
Task 9: Generate and save instant quote between $2,000 and $3,000 by adjusting treatment area
